channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Iran fired missiles at joint US-UK base in Indian Ocean
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran fires missiles at UK’s Diego Garcia base
- Iran denies responsibility for Diego Garcia missile attacks
- Iran denies responsibility for missile attacks on Diego Garcia
- UK says Iran missile attack on Diego Garcia failed
- Iran targets joint US-UK Diego Garcia base
- Iran targets joint US-UK base Diego Garcia base
- Iran fires missiles toward US‑UK Diego Garcia base
- Where is Diego Garcia? The remote base Iran targeted with ballistic missiles explained
- Iran’s 4,000-km missile attack on US-UK military base Diego Garcia foiled, but it sent a message
- Iran SHOCKS US, UK with secret missile power; fires 4000 km at Diego Garcia defying 2k km claim
- Britain condemns “reckless attacks” after Iran fires missiles at UK-US Diego Garcia base in the Indian Ocean
- UK allows US to use bases for Iran war after missiles fired at Diego Garcia
- UK condemns Iran’s ‘reckless’ missile attack on Diego Garcia base
- UK allows US to use bases for Iran war after missiles fired at Diego Garcia
- Iran fires missiles at UK-US base on Diego Garcia in Indian Ocean: US media
- Iran targeted but did not hit Diego Garcia base with missiles, WSJ reports
- Iran reportedly fires missiles towards UK-US base on Diego Garcia
- Iran fires missiles at U.S.-British base in Indian Ocean
- Iran confirms attack on Diego Garcia island with ballistic missiles
- Iran targeted but did not hit Diego Garcia base with missiles: WSJ reports
- Iran fired missiles at joint U.S.-U.K. base in Indian Ocean: report]]>

item.title: Trump threatens Iran with power plant strikes over Hormuz oil blockade

- Trump threatens Iran with power plant strikes over Hormuz blockade

- 'If Iran doesn't...': Trump's threat to Iranian power plants over Strait of Hormuz
- Trump gives Iran 48 hours to open Hormuz as Tehran strikes Israel
- Trump threatens to ‘obliterate’ Iranian power plants

- Trump warns Iran, gives 48 hours to open Strait of Hormuz
- Flash: Trump threatens to hit Iran's power plants if Iran doesn't fully open Strait of Hormuz within 48 hours
